# uptimekuma_monitor_websocket_upgrade (Data Source)

Get Websocket Upgrade monitor information by ID or name

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Read Websocket Upgrade monitor by name
data "uptimekuma_monitor_websocket_upgrade" "example" {
  name = "Websocket Upgrade Monitoring"
}

# Example: Read Websocket Upgrade monitor by ID
data "uptimekuma_monitor_websocket_upgrade" "by_id" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier
- `name` (String) Monitor name

### Read-Only

- `url` (String) URL to monitor
- `ws_ignore_sec_websocket_accept_header` (Boolean) Skip verification of the `Sec-WebSocket-Accept` response header during the WebSocket handshake.
- `ws_subprotocol` (String) Requested `Sec-WebSocket-Protocol` value sent during the WebSocket handshake.
